scope: Pass B full-surface expansion. Source of truth: the official Phyllo Postman collection (getphyllo/phyllo-postman, 'Phyllo APIs.postman_collection.json', fetched 2026-07-03), which enumerates the complete documented Phyllo v1 REST surface (51 requests) since Phyllo's own Stoplight-hosted docs.getphyllo.com reference is a JS-rendered SPA with no static HTML/OpenAPI export reachable outside a browser (matching the prior bundle's own note that Phyllo's public docs are JS-backed). Every endpoint below is covered_by a stream/write action XOR excluded with a real category and reason: 13 GET list/detail endpoints are implemented as streams (the original 4 legacy-parity streams plus 9 new resources: work_platforms, audience, social_comments, social_content_groups, social_income_transactions, social_income_payouts, commerce_income_transactions, commerce_income_payouts, commerce_income_balances, webhooks), and 6 mutations as write actions (create_user, update_account, disconnect_account, create_webhook, update_webhook, delete_webhook). Excluded: single-object detail GETs whose record shape is already covered by the identically-shaped list stream (duplicate_of); async refresh/fetch-historic/bulk-search trigger endpoints, which kick off an out-of-band re-sync or webhook-delivered result rather than returning a syncable record set synchronously (out_of_scope); the SDK-token-issuance and mock-webhook-send endpoints, which are non-data auth/testing artifacts (non_data_endpoint).

excluded.reason: single-work-platform detail; identical record shape to the work_platforms list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-user detail; identical record shape to the users list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-user lookup keyed by caller-assigned external_id instead of the Phyllo id; identical record shape to the users list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
issues a short-lived Connect SDK session token for the frontend widget; an auth/session artifact, not a syncable business record
single-account detail; identical record shape to the accounts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-profile detail; identical record shape to the profiles list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
triggers an asynchronous out-of-band profile re-sync delivered later via webhook, not a synchronous syncable record read; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
